previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the entrance to home straight checked off heels and shifted wide.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 340m in 19.59. Followed that up with a minor placing over 340m at this track at NG three days ago. Excellent record from this draw, including two wins. In the mix.

form.formComment: Impressive performance leading throughout to score by a 0.8 lengths in a Grade 4/5 last start at this track, clocking a solid 24.85 over the 431m trip. In form and worth thought again.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Temora over 330m. Last start finished 2nd over 340m at this track beaten 0.8 lengths (19.65) behind My Machine in a Free For All on April 11. Has a strong record from box 6, including two wins. Go close.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 340m at this track. Likely to struggle this time.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (20.09) at this track in a Free For All, finishing seventh and beaten 7 lengths. Box stats strong with five wins and three placings from 11 starts. Among the main chances.
